signals.headline: Bitcoin Regains Ground After Hitting April Low; Fundstrat's Tom Lee Says Ethereum Poised for 'Supercycle' | NO | MED con
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Regains Ground After Hitting April Low; Fundstrat's Tom Lee Says Ethereum Poised for 'Supercycle' | NO | MED confidence**[1]

Bitcoin stabilized above $95,000 on Monday after briefly dropping to $93,000—its lowest since April—while paring a 0.3% decline to $95,636, amid investor focus on Federal Reserve interest rate cues.[1] Ethereum fell 0.5% to $3,195.93, with spot ETFs recording $729 m
